task:
Make CoCoder's engine repo pass the newly-adopted ESLint 9 linter and wire it into CI. The flat config (eslint.config.mjs), the `lint` script, and pinned deps (eslint 9.39.4, @typescript-eslint via typescript-eslint 8.62.0) already landed; do NOT recreate or expand them. Two concrete changes only:

1. FIX THE ONE REAL LINT VIOLATION (root cause, not paper-over). `pnpm lint` currently fails with exactly one error: `packages/daemon/src/routes.ts:40` — `registerLivePriorities` is imported but never used. Evidence this is a genuinely dead leftover import: the function IS used elsewhere (packages/daemon/src/launcher.ts:2265 and packages/daemon/src/priority-authoring.ts:58 both call it), so the function is real and must NOT be removed; routes.ts simply never calls it. Remove `registerLivePriorities` from the import statement on routes.ts:40 (keep the other named imports: readPriorities, readTickets, writePriorityOrder, writeTicketOrder). Before removing, grep routes.ts once to confirm there is no intended call site (no commented-out call, no dynamic reference) — if you find evidence routes.ts was SUPPOSED to call it (a forgotten wiring), STOP and report that instead of editing; do not guess. FORBIDDEN: do not silence this by adding an eslint-disable comment, by weakening/disabling the no-unused-vars rule, by renaming to a _-prefixed throwaway, or by removing the function definition.

2. WIRE `lint` INTO CI. Edit `.github/workflows/ci.yml`: add a `- run: pnpm lint` step in the `test` job, placed right after the `pnpm typecheck` step (lint is a static gate alongside typecheck). Update the existing top-of-file comment block (currently 'v2 CI is intentionally thin ... Add a check back only when a real failure earns it.') to record the decision: lint now earns a dedicated CI step because CoCoder is agent-built with no human PR review, so ESLint catches a defect class tsc+Vitest miss (floating/unawaited promises, dead code, eval-family). Keep `pnpm test` as pure tests — do NOT fold lint into the `test` script in package.json.

ACCEPTANCE (verify all, report exit codes): `pnpm lint` exits 0; `pnpm typecheck` passes; `pnpm test` passes; `.github/workflows/ci.yml` contains a `pnpm lint` step after typecheck with the updated comment. MUST NOT BREAK: typecheck, test. WRITE SCOPE: packages/daemon/src/routes.ts and .github/workflows/ci.yml ONLY — touch nothing else.
